shortDescription: Spacious 2-bedroom detached home on a quiet street in Roncesvalles with mature trees and a private backyard.
fullDescription: Welcome to 234 Roncesvalles Avenue in the vibrant Roncesvalles neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. The sleeping quarters comprise 2 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. Building amenities include a fitness centre, rooftop terrace, party room, and 24-hour concierge. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: In-suite laundry with full-size washer and dryer
Spacious kitchen with marble backsplash and gas range
